name: Pasithea Therapeutics Corp.
business: Pasithea Therapeutics Corp. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing innovative treatments for RASopathies, MAPK pathway-driven tumors, and CNS disorders. Its lead product candidate, PAS-004, is a next-generation macrocyclic MEK inhibitor for conditions including neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) and certain cancers. The company also has a discovery-stage program, PAS-001, targeting complement component 4A for schizophrenia.
sellsTo: patients with neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) and plexiform neurofibromas
patients with MAPK pathway-driven advanced solid tumors

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on the discovery, research and development of innovative treatments for RASopathies, MAPK pathway-driven tumors, and other diseases, including central nervous system (CNS) disorders.

catalysts.event: Complete FIH Phase 1 Advanced Cancer Study
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the FIH Phase 1 Advanced Cancer Study in 2028.

catalysts.event: Complete Part A of Phase1/1b Adult NF1 Trial and move to Part B
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete Part A by the end of 2026 and move to Part B in 2027 following dialogue with the FDA.

catalysts.event: Complete Part B of Phase1/1b Adult NF1 Trial
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete Part B of the trial in 2028.

catalysts.event: Complete non-clinical ADME, reproductive toxicology, and clinical ADME studies
catalysts.sentence: In 2026 and 2027, we plan to complete non-clinical absorption, distribution, metabolism and excretion ( ADME ) studies, non-clinical developmental and reproductive toxicology studies, and clinical human ADME studies that are key regulatory-required studies prior to initiating a registration trial for PAS-004.

catalysts.event: Initiate and complete drug-drug interaction study and food effect study
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, during 2027 and 2028, we plan to initiate and complete a drug-drug interaction ( DDI ) study to evaluate how PAS-004 interacts with other medications as well as a food effect study to fully determine if PAS-004 can be dosed in a fed state.

tamClaims.claim: NF1 affects approximately one in 3,000 newborns worldwide, with approximately 114,000 patients in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: NF1 affects approximately one in 3,000 newborns throughout the world, with approximately 114,000 patients living in U.S. with NF1.

tamClaims.claim: Schizophrenia affects up to 24 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the World Health Organization ( WHO ) schizophrenia affects up to 24 million people in the world.

tamClaims.claim: Annual U.S. costs associated with schizophrenia estimated to be more than $150 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Schizophrenia is a leading cause of adult disease burden... with annual associated costs in the U.S. estimated to be more than $150 billion.
